title: acaena subnitens
intro: Acaena subnitens, also known as the silver sheep's bur or silver button, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Acaena subnitens may include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Acaena subnitens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
